name: Fate for OpenClaw
description: ChatFate fortune tool for OpenClaw agents.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of ChatFate backend, e.g. https://chatfate.life

endpointPath.description: HTTP path for non-streaming invocation endpoint

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token for Fate API

traceEnabledDefault.description: Default value for trace_enabled when caller does not pass one

includeStepsDefault.description: Default value for include_steps when caller does not pass one

defaultLang.description: Default language passed to Fate API

paymentMode.description: Payment interface mode. Current plugin only exposes status/upgrade hints (no charge execution).

upgradeUrl.description: Optional upgrade/checkout landing URL shown when payment is required.
